prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第48名，近年排名稳定在44–53区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏正面，硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人，报考预估破1.5万），反映学校在教育领域的高人气；抖音热度总排名第67（一般），但2024年曾进入高热榜第13名，短视频曝光度有上升趋势；未见明显投档断档记录；世界史A+、教育学A+、马克思主义理论A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，共6个A-及以上学科；物理类招生专业中生物科学（郝水试验班）对应生物学A-，统计学（数智试验班）对应统计学A，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2022年曾明显升温至推荐，2023–2024年回落至分化观望，整体趋于平稳；计算机类、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏热；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，按近年比例估算物理类约14.3万人，与2025年基本持平；省控线2025年物理类本科批367分，近年波动不大；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区；该校在辽宁省招生占比约4%–6%（2025年辽宁省招生51人，占全国总招生约8.5%），属跨省招生中占比偏高的省份，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至8439名的强势表现、2026年扩招约34.8%带来的竞争缓解、声誉偏正面及师范类热度平稳等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次约10150名，区间9650–10650名。扩招是推动位次数字增大的主要因素，声誉正面和考生规模持平则形成一定支撑。

- 物理学（陆家羲试验班）（师范）
- 化学（郑汝骊试验班）（师范）。

- 化学（师范）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间9650–10650名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档试验班专业冲刺、三档计算机类和统计学保底；位次明显优于区间下限（9650名以内）可重点冲击陆家羲试验班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（10650名附近）建议优先考虑三档中计算机类等热门方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13287 → 13818 → 16726 → 17854 → 8439. After reaching a recent peak of 17854 in 2024, it rebounded significantly to 8439 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is about 8439. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 41, 37, 36, 17, and 23 respectively, with 23 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 31, an increase of about 34.8% compared to 2025, indicating a substantial expansion and expected easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 44–53 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high popularity for master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants exceeding 15,000), reflecting the school's high popularity in the education field. Douyin heat ranking is 67th overall (average), but it entered the top 13 high-heat list in 2024, showing an upward trend in short video exposure. No significant record of admission gaps. Disciplines include World History A+, Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above. Among Physics Category majors, Biological Science (Hao Shui Experimental Class) corresponds to Biology A-, and Statistics (Digital Intelligence Experimental Class) corresponds to Statistics A, highlighting strong disciplinary strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher training/education majors saw a clear warming trend to recommendation in 2022, then cooled to differentiation and wait-and-see in 2023–2024, overall stabilizing. Engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to be socially popular. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 143,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 367 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning Province is about 4%–6% (in 2025, 51 students were enrolled in Liaoning, accounting for about 8.5% of total national enrollment), indicating a relatively high proportion among cross-provincial enrollments and stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 8439, the easing of competition due to a 34.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, positive reputation, and stable popularity of teacher training majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 10150, with a range of 9650–10650. The expansion is the main factor driving the ranking number higher, while positive reputation and stable candidate numbers provide some support.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class) (Teacher Training)
- Physics (Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class) (Teacher Training)
- Chemistry (Zheng Ruli Experimental Class) (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics (Physics (Teacher Training), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training)
- Biological Science (Hao Shui Experimental Class) (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Educational Technology (Smart Education, Teacher Training), Artificial Intelligence Education (Teacher Training))
- Statistics (Digital Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Economics (Economics-Statistics Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9650–10650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 experimental class majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Computer Science and Statistics as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 9650), prioritize targeting Tier 1 majors like the Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class. If the ranking is near the upper bound (around 10650), consider prioritizing popular directions like Computer Science in Tier 3.
